description: REAL (not synthetic) exercise of the fixture-promotion protocol (see tests/fixtures/PROMOTION_PROTOCOL.md). One of the 5 DH-pitching-substitution lines from the live sample game_20260709_h94w — genuinely unparsed[] under schema 1.0.0 (substitution.slot required 1-9; a DH pitching change has no batting-order slot) — was promoted after the additive-MINOR schema evolution to 1.1.0 (substitution.slot made nullable; see docs/design/DECISION.md section 7). This captures the promoted line's actual parse output; test_promoted_dh_pitching_sub.py re-derives it from the live sample so this fixture stays golden, not hand-copied.
promoted_under: schema 1.1.0 (additive MINOR: $defs.substitution.slot -> ["integer","null"], null = pitcher not in the batting order)
raw_line: Ryan Faulks to p for Garrett VanDeventer.

promoted_substitution_event.narrative: Ryan Faulks to p for Garrett VanDeventer.
